project_privacy_data_flows.description: User creates a reminder. Reminder scheduled as local notification via notifee library. Data stored in encrypted database and exposed to Android widgets via SharedPreferences.

flow_steps.code: const reminderId = await db.reminders?.add({ id: reminder?.id, date: date?.getTime(), priority: reminderNotificationMode, title: title.current, ... });
flow_steps.details: User creates or edits a reminder with title, description, date/time, recurrence, and priority.
POST_NOTIFICATIONS permission checked/requested before scheduling notification.

flow_steps.code: await notifee.createTriggerNotification({ id: trigger.id, title, body: description, ... }, trigger);
flow_steps.details: Local notification scheduled via notifee library at specified date/time with optional repeat interval.
Active reminders data serialized to JSON and written to SharedPreferences via native bridge for widget display.
Reminder data (title, description, time) stored as JSON in SharedPreferences and read by Android widget RemoteViewsService.
Foreground service for notification restoration after device reboot.
POST_NOTIFICATIONS permission for displaying reminder notifications.
